title: platostoma lanceolatum
intro: Platostoma lanceolatum, also known as African Bluebells, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering health benefits such as improved digestion, faster wound healing, and reduced inflammation. Platostoma lanceolatum is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to promote healing and relaxation.
